title: Eval, aigmap combination bug.
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue
```
module lutbug ( addr, out);
	input [7:0] addr;
	output [3:0] out;
	assign out = addr[7:4] * addr[3:0];
endmodule
```

```
read_verilog bug.v
synth
abc
eval -set addr 24
aigmap
eval -set addr 24
```


## Expected behavior

Expect eval to give same output before and after aigmap.

## Actual behavior

Output of eval differs.
